macAddress.label: MAC Address
macAddress.help: Required for Power Save Mode 3 and 4 (Wake-on-LAN enabled).

broadcastAddress.label: WOL Broadcast Address
broadcastAddress.help: Subnet broadcast address for WOL packets. If empty, derived from host IP (e.g. 192.168.1.100 → 192.168.1.255).

powerSaveMode.label: Power Save Mode

options.label: Mode 1: WOL off, source input wake off (cannot wake via network)
Mode 2: WOL off, source input wake on (wakes on source signal only)
Mode 3: WOL on, source input wake off (requires MAC address)
Mode 4: WOL on, source input wake on (recommended, requires MAC address)

powerSaveMode.help: Must match the Power Save mode on your display. Mode 1/2: WOL disabled, no network wake. Mode 3/4: WOL enabled, requires MAC address.

monitorId.label: Monitor ID
monitorId.help: Monitor ID (1-255) as configured on the display
